# API Contracts — FastAPI

**Base URL:** `/api/v1/`  
**OpenAPI docs:** `/docs` (auto-generated by FastAPI)  
**Response format:** JSON. Errors follow RFC 7807 Problem JSON.  
**Auth:** None in Phase 1. API key header for admin endpoints in Phase 2.

---

## Phase 1 Endpoints

### `GET /stats/summary`

High-level counts shown in the frontend stats banner.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "total_deputies": 513,
  "total_beneficiaries": 12450,
  "total_amendments_brl": 4200000000.00,
  "total_ceap_brl": 230000000.00,
  "latest_amendment_year": 2024,
  "last_sync_at": "2026-04-01T03:00:00Z"
}
```

---

### `GET /deputies`

Paginated, filterable list of deputies.

**Query params:**
- `party` — filter by party acronym (e.g. `PL`)
- `state` — filter by UF (e.g. `SP`)
- `limit` — default `50`, max `200`
- `offset` — default `0`

**Response:**
```json
{
  "total": 513,
  "items": [
    {
      "camara_id": 4497,
      "name": "ARTHUR LIRA",
      "party": "PP",
      "state": "AL",
      "photo_url": "https://...",
      "total_amendments_brl": 15000000.00
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### `GET /deputies/{camara_id}`

Full deputy profile.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "camara_id": 4497,
  "name": "ARTHUR LIRA",
  "party": "PP",
  "state": "AL",
  "photo_url": "https://...",
  "stats": {
    "total_amendments_brl": 15000000.00,
    "total_ceap_brl": 540000.00,
    "amendment_count": 48,
    "top_beneficiary": "PREFEITURA DE MACEIÓ",
    "top_policy_area": "Saúde"
  }
}
```

---

### `GET /deputies/{camara_id}/amendments`

Paginated amendment list for one deputy.

**Query params:**
- `year` — filter by year
- `limit` — default `50`
- `offset` — default `0`

**Response:**
```json
{
  "total": 48,
  "items": [
    {
      "amendment_code": "202400010000999",
      "beneficiary_name": "PREFEITURA DE MACEIÓ",
      "beneficiary_cnpj": "12345678000199",
      "amount_brl": 500000.00,
      "year": 2024,
      "policy_area": "Saúde",
      "amendment_type": "Emenda Individual - Transferências Especiais"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### `GET /graph/{entity_id}`

**The primary endpoint.** Returns a Cytoscape.js-compatible subgraph centered on an entity.

**Path params:**
- `entity_id` — format: `deputy_{camara_id}` or `beneficiary_{cnpj_cpf}` or `party_{acronym}`

**Query params:**
- `depth` — hop depth, default `2`, max `3`
- `max_nodes` — default `100`, max `300`
- `year` — optional filter on edge years
- `edge_type` — `amendment` | `ceap` | `all` (default `all`)

**Response:**
```json
{
  "center_id": "deputy_4497",
  "nodes": [
    {
      "data": {
        "id": "deputy_4497",
        "label": "ARTHUR LIRA",
        "type": "deputy",
        "party": "PP",
        "state": "AL",
        "total_brl": 15000000.00
      }
    },
    {
      "data": {
        "id": "beneficiary_12345678000199",
        "label": "PREFEITURA DE MACEIÓ",
        "type": "beneficiary",
        "legal_nature": "Ente Público Municipal",
        "uf": "AL",
        "total_received_brl": 500000.00
      }
    }
  ],
  "edges": [
    {
      "data": {
        "id": "amend_deputy_4497_beneficiary_12345678000199_2024",
        "source": "deputy_4497",
        "target": "beneficiary_12345678000199",
        "type": "amendment",
        "amount_brl": 500000.00,
        "year": 2024,
        "count": 1
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

**Caching:** Redis key `graph:{entity_id}:depth{n}:year{y}:type{t}`, TTL 300s.

---

### `GET /graph/top-spenders`

Deputies ranked by total spending.

**Query params:**
- `year` — default current year
- `type` — `amendment` | `ceap` | `all`
- `limit` — default `20`, max `50`

**Response:**
```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "camara_id": 4497,
      "name": "ARTHUR LIRA",
      "party": "PP",
      "state": "AL",
      "total_brl": 15000000.00,
      "graph_id": "deputy_4497"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### `GET /graph/top-recipients`

Beneficiaries ranked by total money received.

**Query params:**
- `year` — default current year
- `type` — `amendment` | `ceap` | `all`
- `limit` — default `20`

**Response:** Same shape as top-spenders but with beneficiary fields.

---

### `GET /beneficiaries/{cnpj_cpf}`

Beneficiary profile with list of deputies who sent money.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "cnpj_cpf": "12345678000199",
  "name": "PREFEITURA DE MACEIÓ",
  "legal_nature": "Ente Público Municipal",
  "uf": "AL",
  "municipality": "Maceió",
  "graph_id": "beneficiary_12345678000199",
  "stats": {
    "total_received_brl": 5000000.00,
    "amendment_count": 12,
    "unique_deputies": 4
  }
}
```

---

## Phase 2 Endpoints (not yet built)

```
GET  /search?q={query}                        full-text search (Elasticsearch)
POST /graph/shortest-path                     { source_id, target_id } → path nodes/edges
WS   /ws/graph-updates                        WebSocket: push new ingestion events
POST /admin/sync/trigger    [API key required] manually trigger ETL run
GET  /admin/sync/logs       [API key required] list recent sync_log entries
```

---

## Error Response Format (RFC 7807)

```json
{
  "type": "https://cotagraph.app/errors/not-found",
  "title": "Deputy not found",
  "status": 404,
  "detail": "No deputy found with camara_id=99999",
  "instance": "/api/v1/deputies/99999"
}
```
